old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.2.1","title":"Security analysis: rollback vs safe-advance SSN on OSCORE NVM failure","description":"Analyze per RFC 8613 Section 7.2 and AES-CCM nonce uniqueness requirements which approach is safer: decrement sender_seq on NVM failure (risk of reuse on reboot) or advance sender_seq by large margin (e.g. +256 or to next 2^8 boundary) under mutex re-lock. Document chosen approach with rationale in oscore.c comments. Reference python-ano.41 and oscore_ctx_persist_ssn. Set as P0.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T05:26:14.322475278Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T05:26:14.322475278Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.2.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-23T05:26:14.462584203Z","created_by":"AI Agent","metadata":"{}"}]}
